svg.title: rag-suite architecture

svg.text: April 2026 — ragorchestrator, CRAG, agentic observability, MXR cache, Vulkan RADV
:8090 — Semantic router, RAG pipeline, citation validation
confidence check -> if low: rewrite query -> re-retrieve -> rerank again
